__comment__: Milestone 2 starter subset minus Array. Array folder is deferred on issue #73 (proper sparse-array storage). Growth guards in SharpTSArray.Set and SharpTSArrayGlobal.Call prevent the most common OOM path, but individual Array.prototype methods still drive process memory past the in-process runner's watchdog threshold on tests that exercise sparse semantics. Adding Array to this list without first shipping sparse storage will exhaust memory.
